Uses of Package
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime

Packages that use nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime
Package
Description
nonprofitbookkeeping.api
Defines the public integration API for nonprofit bookkeeping.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.excel
Implements Excel-based report generation support.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper
Provides JasperReports integration entry points.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.generator
Implements concrete Jasper report generators.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime
Contains Jasper runtime execution utilities.
nonprofitbookkeeping.service
Implements application service-layer use cases.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions
Contains reusable UI action handlers.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers
Provides UI helper utilities and support classes.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels
Contains UI panel implementations for major screens.
  • Classes in nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime used by nonprofitbookkeeping.api
    Class
    Description
    ReportContext
    Holds the context or criteria for generating a specific financial report.

    Description

    Immutable metadata describing a single generator/template bundle.
    ReportContext
    Holds the context or criteria for generating a specific financial report.
    ReportContextAware
    Optional hook for report generators that need access to the ReportContext after instantiation.
